modules.name: Hitachi VSP One Block
modules.description: Full management for Hitachi VSP One Block storage arrays — volumes, snapshots, replication, ports, host groups, NVMe, and remote copy pairs.

env_vars.description: URL of the VSP One Block API service

modules.name: Brocade SAN
modules.description: Fibre Channel switch management for Brocade / Broadcom SAN fabrics — zones, aliases, ports, and fabric discovery.

env_vars.description: URL of the Brocade API service

modules.name: VMware vSphere
modules.description: vCenter and ESXi management — VMs, datastores, networks, snapshots, and resource pools.

env_vars.description: URL of the VMware API service

modules.name: Proxmox VE
modules.description: Proxmox Virtual Environment management — VMs, LXC containers, storage, networks, and cluster overview.

env_vars.description: URL of the Proxmox API service
